feedback.technicalIssues: Yes, I inadvertently swiped back on my touch screen when "grading" a game.  It took me back to   game 8 when I should have moved up to game 10
feedback.suggestions: No.  I couldn't figure out the game with the shapes and the shifts to make it smaller/taller/thinner.
feedback.funCriteria: Whether or not I was good at it :-)  I don't know.  Most games are fun if I can figure out the game play.
